title: Junior Business Development Manager at Wadhwa Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Wadhwa Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Wadhwa Group in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Wadhwa Group:
Wadhwa Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wadhwa Group!
